craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post 3-MONTH FURNISHED RENTAL, INCLUDES ALL UTILITIES & AMENITIES --RENTAL PERIOD: June 9 to September 9, 2026 --Apt is centrally located in Coral Gables, 10 minute walk to Miracle Mile --Max 2 people --Assigned spot in private, gated parking lot --Swimming pool (only for residents) --Recently renovated kitchen with induction stove, microwave oven (pots, utensils, and basic cooking supplies included) --High speed internet, large LCD TV and basic TV included --Washer, dryer on premises (takes coins) --Queen size bed (linens and towels provided) --Hall and linen closets --Full bathroom with tub --NON-smoking unit --Rent for the first and last months must be paid before moving in ($3400) --Second month ($1700) due July 9

craigslist.title: Private room in house
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post Beautiful room to rent in a shared house. Including share bathroom and kitchen, WiFi access, water,electricity and nice patio with bbq. All room mates are professionals, this is not a party house . No pets No drugs No visit No smoke Background check required First and last month $500 deposit At least 2 references Proof of income 15 min from Nova University 8 min from Broward college south campus 10 min Pembroke lakes mall 30 mins from Mia airport 20 from Fll airport 10 mins to Miami stadium Many restaurants and amenities. Located at Miramar parkway in between Douglas and Palm avenue.

craigslist.title: Ladies Only
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post If you’re looking for a temporary place during a stressful time you can pay up to two weeks for $275/week. You would be sharing space either on the spacious bottom bunk bed of a bedroom or on the futon-your choice. Dinner is free too. This is a clean drug free, alcohol free and smoke free environment. Not doing any of that near the premise. It is peaceful. This may be ideal for someone working as a dancer. This is for a single lady person. No men. Again this is temporary.
